name: iPolloWork
desc: Next-gen, source-available alternative to Codex and Claude Code — one local-first, self-hostable agent workspace for code, office work, editable design, presen…
descFull: Next-gen, source-available alternative to Codex and Claude Code — one local-first, self-hostable agent workspace for code, office work, editable design, presentations, websites, and video. Build with AI, then edit text, images, colors, layouts, and scenes as easily as PowerPoint.
